generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force logistics officer, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. The recent NATO exercises in Eastern Europe showed exactly why we can't afford to cut back on our commitments. Remember when we had to evacuate personnel from Ukraine in 2022? That only worked because of our treaty partners. We can't let partisan politics weaken our defenses. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
